behavior: The verified v2.9.5 source candidate is published through the authorized release workflow, and its public artifacts, metadata, and immutable references are validated before v3 work begins.
revision_scope: Public release source at the immutable tag plus the post-publication verifier correction at the recorded revision.
platform: local Darwin arm64 host and GitHub-hosted release runners
changes: Published the committed v2.9.5 source candidate through the authorized hosted release workflow.
Validated exact public assets, checksums, archive contents, SBOM bindings, provenance, release metadata, and immutable tag references.
Downloaded the public no-account Mac DMG and repeated mount, architecture, metadata, install, launch, local-data, checksum, SBOM, and provenance checks.
Corrected the public verifier to bind attestations to the reusable workflow that owns each artifact.

commands.relevant_result: Release input, preflight, browser, Rust, package, publication, checksum, SBOM, attestation, and public-verification contracts passed.
commands.caveat: The Mac release uses the authorized no-account path.

commands.command: gh workflow run release.yml --ref v2.9.5 -f version=2.9.5 -f platform=all
commands.relevant_result: Run 29633409832 completed successfully against the immutable source revision.
commands.caveat: The no-account Mac package is ad-hoc signed, not Developer ID signed, not notarized, and not Gatekeeper-ready.

commands.relevant_result: All 20 public assets had the exact expected names and versions; checksums, archives, SBOM bindings, and provenance predicates passed.
commands.caveat: The final run used the authenticated GitHub CLI before a local credential wrapper in PATH.

commands.relevant_result: The downloaded no-account DMG passed checksum, universal architecture, metadata, signature integrity, visible-window, local-data, install, SBOM, and provenance checks.
commands.caveat: Expected public trust rejection was observed because Developer ID signing and notarization are unavailable.

commands.relevant_result: All 33 focused verifier tests passed after fail-first coverage proved each reusable signer mapping.
commands.caveat: The released application artifacts were unaffected by the verifier-only correction.

commands.relevant_result: All 834 script tests passed after the verifier correction.

commands.command: npm run harness:check && npm run lint:scripts && npm run lint:file-size
commands.relevant_result: Canonical state, harness, script quality, and maintained-file hard limits passed.
